function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-04-14
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order

```text
| field          | value                         |

| purchased_on   | 2026-04-14                    |
| total_eur      | 27                            |
| counterparty   | Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien       |
| project        | Window Farm Notes             |
| related_entity | Oskar Novak                   |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

function.message: Completed. I processed the next inbox item and OCR-structured all bills related to Oskar Novak. One matching bill was found and updated with YAML frontmatter while preserving the original note body verbatim.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflow/schema docs, treated inbox as request not truth, used canonical finance lane records, preserved original body during OCR migration, and deleted processed inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked to OCR all bills related to Oskar Novak. Search in 50_finance/purchases returned exactly one matching bill referencing related_entity Oskar Novak, and that file was updated to the required bill frontmatter shape with lines extracted from visible note content; no other Oskar-related bill matches were found.
